title: bassia scoparia subsp. culta
intro: Bassia scoparia subsp. culta, also known as huang qi or Chinese thorowax, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. It is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bassia scoparia subsp. culta include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and increased energy levels, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Bassia scoparia subsp. culta is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various traditional remedies.
